overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist Link running through a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character traverses snow-covered terrain under a starry sky, briefly encountering a wolf before approaching large rocky outcrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain slope with distant forest

events.description: character passes the wolf and continues running uphill

agents.ego_description: running through deep snow toward a wolf in the distance, then passing it on the left

notable_agents.action: wolf running across the snow to the left of the character's path

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered mountain terrain stretching into the distance
dark night sky filled with visible stars and light snowfall
distant pine trees covered in snow on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy mountain slope at night, with Link running through deep snow under a starry sky. A wolf appears in the distance and runs parallel to the left side of the character before being passed. Snow-covered pine trees stand on the distant right hillside.

agents.ego_description: steadily running uphill through the snow, moving away from the wolf encounter

segments.scene_description: Link continues running uphill through the open snow-covered terrain. The pine trees on the right side grow closer as the character advances. The environment remains consistent with gentle snowfall and clear night visibility.

events.description: large rock formation becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching a large rock outcrop while continuing to move uphill through the snow

entered.detail: large dark gray rock outcrop partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: As Link continues uphill, a large rock formation emerges on the right and grows progressively larger, eventually dominating the center of the view. The pine trees shift to the left side of the frame as the character approaches the rocky outcrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a snowy mountain slope at night that transitions from an open tundra into a rugged rocky landscape. It begins with Link running through deep snow under a starry sky, passing a wolf that sprints parallel to him on the left. As he continues his uphill ascent, the distant pine trees on the right hillside gradually grow closer and more defined amidst a gentle snowfall. The scene then shifts as a massive rock formation emerges from the right, progressively expanding to dominate the center of the frame. Finally, the pine trees move to the left side of the view as the character approaches the towering rocky outcrop.
